title: Clean FE Skill — Next.js / React
desc: Quy ước clean code FE: no-any, tách component, re-render, crash safety, performance.

title: Clean BE Skill — Express / NestJS
desc: Quy ước clean code BE: layering, N+1, query performance, security, error handling.

title: New Feature Skill — Blueprint trước khi code
desc: Checklist plan trước khi viết code: API contract, data model, file structure, edge case.

title: Debug Skill — Quy trình debug có hệ thống
desc: Frame vấn đề → debug theo tầng (network, validation, service, DB, FE state) → cô lập bug.

title: DB Schema Skill — Prisma Schema + Migration
desc: Naming convention, field design, relation, index strategy, soft delete, migration discipline.

title: API Design Skill — REST API chuẩn
desc: URL design, request/response shape, HTTP status, pagination, naming nhất quán, security.

title: Auth Skill — Authentication & Authorization
desc: JWT, refresh token, RBAC, middleware guard, password hashing, cookie security, FE auth state.

title: TypeScript Skill — Pattern & Utility Type
desc: Utility type, generic, type guard, discriminated union, Zod validate, branded type.

title: Testing Skill — Unit & Integration Test FE + BE
desc: AAA pattern, Jest, Supertest, React Testing Library, msw, coverage strategy.

title: Git Workflow Skill — Branch, Commit, PR, Review
desc: Branch naming, Conventional Commits, commit hygiene, PR template, rebase vs merge.

title: Env & Config Skill — Environment Variables + Secrets
desc: Validate env khi start, phân loại secret vs config, .env.example, feature flags.

title: Logging & Monitoring Skill — Structured Log + Error Tracking
desc: Log level, structured logger, correlation ID, slow query log, Sentry, alert strategy.

title: Prompt Engineering Skill — Làm việc hiệu quả với AI
desc: Template prompt theo task, cung cấp context đúng, kiểm soát output, workflow hàng ngày.

title: Deployment Skill — CI/CD, Docker, Rollback
desc: Pipeline stages, Docker best practices, migration deploy đúng thứ tự, zero-downtime, rollback plan.

title: State Management Skill — Zustand, React Query, Context
desc: Choose the right state management solution, separate server state from client state, prevent unnecessary re-renders and keep state predictable.

title: Frontend Performance Skill — Core Web Vitals, Bundle, Lazy Load
desc: Optimize Core Web Vitals, bundle size, rendering performance, lazy loading, code splitting and image optimization.

title: Caching Skill — Redis, HTTP Cache, React Query
desc: HTTP caching, Redis, CDN, React Query cache, cache invalidation strategies and cache consistency best practices.

title: Error Design Skill — Error Code, Exception, UX
desc: Design consistent error responses, custom error classes, error codes, frontend error handling and user-friendly error experience.

title: Queue Job Skill — Background Job, Retry, BullMQ
desc: Background processing with queues, retry strategy, dead letter queue, scheduling jobs and idempotent workers.

title: File Upload Skill — Validation, S3, Processing
desc: Secure file uploads, validation, storage, S3 integration, image processing and malware prevention best practices.

title: Realtime Skill — WebSocket, SSE, Polling
desc: Choose between WebSocket, Server-Sent Events and polling, manage realtime architecture and scalable event delivery.

title: Refactoring Skill — Safe Migration, Incremental Refactor
desc: Refactor legacy code safely using incremental changes, characterization tests and low-risk migration strategies.

title: Security Checklist Skill — OWASP, CORS, Headers
desc: Practical security checklist covering OWASP Top 10, authentication, authorization, headers, CORS, validation and secrets management.

title: Code Review Skill — Review Checklist, Quality, Maintainability
desc: Comprehensive code review checklist covering correctness, readability, performance, security, testing and maintainability for frontend and backend.
